title: A Density-Based Algorithm for Discovering Clusters in Large Spatial Databases with Noise
why_this_label: DBSCAN is a density-based clustering algorithm and should not be introduced as a computer-vision paper.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as a data-mining clustering method case rather than evidence for the Computer Vision aggregate.
human_check_next_step: Confirm award citation wording and keep the corrected manual topic in report/PPT.

title: Snakes: Active Contour Models
why_this_label: The title and venue directly support active contours for image segmentation/boundary modeling.
careful_wording_boundary: Safe as a computer-vision foundational model case; avoid claiming all later segmentation methods derive from it.
human_check_next_step: Open DOI/paper page before finalizing the one-sentence contribution.

title: Graphs over Time: Densification Laws, Shrinking Diameters and Possible Explanations
why_this_label: The paper analyzes temporal graph patterns and fits data-mining/network-science framing.
careful_wording_boundary: Use breadth as OpenAlex sampled proxy only; do not call it complete cross-field diffusion.
human_check_next_step: Check whether the chosen slide emphasizes empirical laws rather than official award reasoning.

title: Multitasking without compromise: a virtual machine evolution
why_this_label: Venue and title suggest PL/systems VM design rather than Data Mining / Web; existing notes flag DOI/match verification risk.
careful_wording_boundary: Treat as a candidate PL/VM systems case only after ACM/OOPSLA page verification.
human_check_next_step: Human must verify the exact paper page/award source before using this as a representative case.

title: Probabilistic Models of Indexing and Searching
why_this_label: SIGIR venue and indexing/searching title support IR probability-model framing rather than broad NLP.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as an IR/probabilistic retrieval case; do not overstate it as modern NLP evidence.
human_check_next_step: Confirm contribution wording with SIGIR/ACM source before final report.

title: Research Areas in Computer Communication
why_this_label: Title and venue support early networking research-agenda framing.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as a research-agenda/field-framing case; low citation count means it should not support high-citation claims.
human_check_next_step: Check award citation before using as a main slide case.

title: Modeling TCP Throughput: A Simple Model and Its Empirical Validation
why_this_label: Title and venue support TCP performance-modeling framing.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as a network measurement/model case; avoid saying short lag proves faster technical value maturation.
human_check_next_step: Verify contribution phrase against paper/ACM source.

title: Object Recognition from Local Scale-Invariant Features
why_this_label: ICCV venue and scale-invariant local features support Computer Vision / SIFT-style feature framing.
careful_wording_boundary: Safe as a vision feature-representation case; industrial impact needs separate evidence.
human_check_next_step: Open paper/DOI before final slide wording.

title: Mining Association Rules Between Sets of Items in Large Databases
why_this_label: The paper defines association-rule mining inside database/data-mining context.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as problem-formulation/data-mining case; do not treat as pure database systems ranking evidence.
human_check_next_step: Confirm exact contribution wording and pair with VLDB 1994 only if the report explains the sequence.

title: Ad-hoc On-Demand Distance Vector Routing
why_this_label: AODV is a mobile ad hoc network routing protocol; HCI API label is visibly inaccurate.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as a networking protocol case and as an example of why manual topic audit matters.
human_check_next_step: Verify IEEE page and avoid claiming deployment impact without evidence.

title: Fast Algorithms for Mining Association Rules in Large Databases
why_this_label: Apriori/frequent itemset mining belongs to association-rule data mining.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as algorithmic continuation of association-rule line; do not double-count it as independent proof of industrial impact.
human_check_next_step: Check VLDB PDF before final contribution sentence.

title: Network Information Flow
why_this_label: Network coding/information flow is better framed as information theory/network coding than ML theory.
careful_wording_boundary: Use as theory/network cross-over case; award source field must be stated carefully because venue is a journal.
human_check_next_step: Verify award seed source and DOI before using as a final representative slide.
